positive: A highly detailed, mystical botanical illustration featuring luminous crescent moons, intricate stardust trailing vines, and bioluminescent tropical flowers interwoven with geometric celestial patterns. The composition should be perfectly centered and optimized for a clean silhouette, resembling an engraved tapestry or a scientific sketch. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted against an off-white background. Style should be Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with cosmic abstract elements, employing strong cross-hatching, fine line work, and perfect symmetry. Cinematic volumetric lighting, macro detail, ultra-sharp focus, ready for screen printing.
negative: blurry, amateur, low resolution, noise, grain, watermarks, signatures, text, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, tiling, low contrast, messy, cartoon, photorealistic
